headline: Apple Eyes Meta For Potentially Game-Changing AI Partnership: Report
summary: Apple is reportedly in talks with Meta Platforms about the possibility of integrating Meta's generative AI model into Apple's new AI system, Apple Intelligence.

headline: DraftKings And Dell Were Among The 10 Biggest Large Cap Stock Gainers Last Week (June 16-June 22): Are These In Your Portfolio?
summary: Top performers last week were SRPT (+29.50%), SIRI (+16.73%), TOST (+15.57%), GILD (+12.62%), CHWY (+10.59%), ACN (+9.80%), DKNG (+9.69%), DELL (+8.19%), ADSK (+7.99%), and GFI (+7.15%).
